Ticket Classification GenAI

pipeline module

src.pipeline.classify_ticket(ticket_text, embedding_model, clf)[source]

Classify a support ticket and generate a justification.

The function generates an embedding for the ticket, predicts its class using a trained classifier, and produces a natural language explanation for the prediction.

Parameters:

  • ticket_text (str) – Raw text of the support ticket.

  • embedding_model (SentenceTransformer) – Loaded embedding model.

  • clf (LogisticRegression) – Trained classification model.

Returns:

Dictionary containing the predicted class and its justification.

Return type:

dict

Example:

from src.pipeline import classify_ticket

result = classify_ticket(
    "VPN connection fails when logging in",
    embedding_model,
    clf
)

print(result["classe"])
print(result["justificativa"])
